summary: Genuine: the trigger test's destination state (LANDED, turn_on_enter=AGENT) is deliberately chosen to differ from the source's turn (WORKING=USER) so the turn-recomputed assertion can actually discriminate; also checks the hook's real call log (exactly one WORKING->LANDED call), history entry fields (from/to/trigger='advance'), and freshly-seeded PENDING responsibilities on the new entry -- no mocking of the code path under test.
